x-enumeration-literals.name: BuyersItemNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Product identifier assigned by the buyer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CommercialDescriptionCodeName
x-enumeration-literals.description: A code to identify a product based on applicable commercial conditions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: EAN
x-enumeration-literals.description: The unique EAN (European Article Number) code.

x-enumeration-literals.name: HarmonizedTariffCodeName
x-enumeration-literals.description: Classification of goods as developed by the Customs Cooperation council.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ManufacturersItemNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Product identifier as assigned by the manufacturer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ModelNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reference number assigned by the manufacturer to differentiate variations in similar products in a class or group.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PartNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reference assigned by the manufacturer to a product part.

x-enumeration-literals.name: QuotaCategory
x-enumeration-literals.description: Product identifier used by the retail industry.

x-enumeration-literals.name: StyleNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identification of the style of a product.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SuppliersItemNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned to an article by the supplier of that article.

x-enumeration-literals.name: UniversalProductCode
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned to a manufacturer's product by the Product Code Council.
